name: Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Pro
title: Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Pro
short_description: Video Doorbell, 1080p HD video at 30 FPS, 5MP camera with IR LED, Motion detection sensor, IPX4-rated
description: Video Doorbell, 1080p HD video at 30 FPS, 5MP camera with IR LED, Motion detection sensor, IPX4-rated

detailed_description.heading: Premium UniFi Doorbell
detailed_description.text: The G4 Doorbell Professional from Ubiquiti is a state-of-the-art video doorbell designed to offer advanced security and surveillance capabilities for homes and businesses. This device is part of Ubiquiti's esteemed line of UniFi Protect video security systems, known for their high-quality construction, superior performance, and seamless integration with other Ubiquiti products.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text:
- Improved HDR and low-light performance
- Programmable welcome display and secondary package-detection camera
- 6 m (20 ft) IR night vision
- AI event detections
- Weather-resistant (outdoor covered)
- Integrated 2-way audio
- Wirelessly connected with UniFi WiFi Auto-Link*

detailed_description.heading: Design and Durability
detailed_description.text: Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, the G4 Doorbell Professional features a sleek, modern design that complements any exterior aesthetic. Its robust construction with IPX4 weatherproofing protection level is suited for outdoor use, ensuring durability against weather elements such as rain, dust, and temperature fluctuations. This resilience makes the G4 Doorbell Pro an ideal choice for users seeking a reliable security solution that can withstand the challenges of outdoor environments.

detailed_description.heading: High-Definition Video
detailed_description.text: Equipped with a high-definition video camera (a primary 5MP camera and a secondary 8MP package camera) the G4 Doorbell Pro delivers crisp, clear video footage, capturing fine details with precision. This camera is enhanced with night vision capabilities, ensuring continuous monitoring and security around the clock. The device also incorporates advanced features such as motion detection and smart person recognition, enabling users to receive alerts and notifications directly on their smart devices whenever someone approaches their door, thereby enhancing security and convenience.

detailed_description.heading: Two-Way Audio
detailed_description.text: For seamless communication, the G4 Doorbell Professional includes a two-way audio system, allowing homeowners to interact with visitors in real-time from anywhere. Whether it's greeting guests or deterring unwanted visitors, this feature provides an added layer of security and convenience.

detailed_description.heading: UniFi Protect Integration
detailed_description.text: Integration with the UniFi Protect platform is a key highlight of the G4 Doorbell Pro, offering users intuitive and comprehensive control over their security setup. Through the UniFi Protect app, users can access live video feeds, review recorded footage, customize settings, and receive real-time alerts, all from the convenience of their smartphone or tablet. This integration ensures a unified and user-friendly experience across the entire UniFi Protect ecosystem.

detailed_description.heading: Installation
detailed_description.text: Installation of the G4 Doorbell Professional is designed to be straightforward, with detailed instructions and necessary hardware included, making it accessible for DIY enthusiasts and professionals alike. The doorbell connects to the home's existing wiring for power, ensuring reliable operation without the need for frequent battery changes.

detailed_description.heading: A Comprehensive Security Solution
detailed_description.text: G4 Doorbell Professional from Ubiquiti represents a fusion of advanced technology, superior design, and robust construction. With features such as high-definition video, night vision, motion detection, and smart integration, it stands out as a comprehensive security solution. Its compatibility with the UniFi Protect system further enhances its appeal, offering users a versatile, reliable, and easy-to-use video doorbell that elevates the security and convenience of any property.

items.name: Night Mode
items.value: IR LED Illumination and IR Cut Filter

items.name: Chipset
items.value: Quad core Arm ® Cortex ® -A53 based chip
